contextPanelDescription: Switch sources, resource details, and guidance with the active workspace.
mobileNavigationDescription: Switch workspace modes, sessions, and account tools.
graphDescription: This phase reserves the graph workspace in the top-level shell without shipping the real graph experience yet.
graphEmptyDescription: The shell now has an explicit graph slot. The actual graph canvas and data flow stay out of scope for phase one.
forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this page.
authDegradedDescription: The authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Try again or return to the login page.
workspaceResourceHint: Manage local resources, versions, and indexing status.
apiErrorBadRequest: The request is invalid. Check the input and try again.
apiErrorBadGateway: The upstream service is unavailable. Try again later.
apiErrorConflict: This action conflicts with the current state. Refresh and try again.
apiErrorEmbeddingNotConfigured: Configure the retrieval provider before uploading.
apiErrorFileNotFound: The file no longer exists. Upload it again and retry.
apiErrorForbidden: Your account does not have permission to perform this action.
apiErrorGatewayTimeout: The service took too long to respond. Try again later.
apiErrorGeneric: The request failed. Try again later.
apiErrorInvalidCredentials: The username or password is incorrect. Try again.
apiErrorInvalidDocument: The resource content is invalid or cannot be processed right now.
apiErrorNotFound: The requested resource does not exist or was removed.
apiErrorPayloadTooLarge: The submitted content is too large. Reduce it and try again.
apiErrorPendingEmbeddingNotConfigured: Finish configuring the new retrieval provider before uploading.
apiErrorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again in 5 minutes.
apiErrorServer: The service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
apiErrorServiceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
apiErrorUnauthorized: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
apiErrorUnsupportedMediaType: The file type or request content is not supported.
apiErrorValidation: The submitted content is invalid. Check it and try again.
